assertions.reason: Live WebSocket registration for utv-registry-07b565d08b3f-a returned a registered ack, GET /sessions showed the session idle and online, and duplicate registration replaced the old socket without creating a duplicate registry entry.
After registering utv-registry-07b565d08b3f-a and utv-registry-07b565d08b3f-b, the live /sessions response listed both sessions with the expected sessionId, idle state, and online=true fields.
The live utv-registry-07b565d08b3f-state session moved idle → executing on turn/started, to waitingApproval on serverRequest/approval, and back to idle with turnCount=1 after turn/completed.

Live disconnect of utv-registry-07b565d08b3f-grace produced online=false with a graceExpiresAt timestamp, reconnect within the window returned resumed=true and preserved waitingApproval state/history, and the targeted relay-server test confirmed eviction after grace expiry.

Live websocket malformed inputs returned error frames for invalid JSON, pre-register messages, invalid register bodies, and wrong-session messages; malformed REST JSON returned HTTP 400 with {"error":"Invalid JSON body"}; and the server continued answering GET /sessions afterward.

The live service answered GET /sessions with HTTP 200, application/json, and an empty array before registration, while websocket clients observed HTTP 101 upgrades; the targeted relay-server test also passed for empty-start and JSON response behavior.

commandsRun.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/server" && node --input-type=module <<'NODE' [live relay registry/state validation script] NODE
commandsRun.observation: Saved live-registry-check.json with HTTP 200 health, websocket 101 handshakes, duplicate registration replacement, session state transitions, grace-period resume data, and malformed websocket error responses.
Live REST health check returned status=200 and content_type=application/json; charset=utf-8.

commandsRun.command: curl --noproxy "*" -sS -D <headers> -o <body> -X POST -H "content-type: application/json" --data "{bad json" -w "status=%{http_code} content_type=%{content_type}" http://127.0.0.1:9501/sessions
commandsRun.observation: Malformed REST JSON returned status=400 and body {"error":"Invalid JSON body"}.

commandsRun.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/server" && npx vitest run "src/relay-server.test.ts" -t "starts empty and exposes JSON REST responses|keeps disconnected sessions during grace period, resumes on reconnect, and evicts after timeout|handles malformed websocket and REST payloads without crashing"
commandsRun.observation: Targeted relay-server suite passed 3 focused tests covering empty startup, grace-period eviction, and malformed-input resilience.

summary: Validated 6 relay server registry/state assertions: VAL-SRV-001, 002, 003, 005, 011, and 012 all passed via live relay API/websocket checks, with targeted Vitest support for grace-period eviction and malformed-input/startup behaviors.
